name: methanol_logp_partition
prompt: Run the logp-partition task on methanol using the PM7 (mopac) method in the gas phase. Report the logP partition coefficient (the dimensionless octanol-water log P) as the headline value (the logp-partition task also returns per-solvent solvation free energies and total energies — do NOT report those as the headline value), state the method used, and surface any warnings the calculation produced about PM7 parameter coverage. Use the chemkit tools; do not guess the number. Use charge 0 and multiplicity 1.
